controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 8220616.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 1, 2020 at 23:09

did.abstract: Collection consists of 35 mm color and black and white slides pertaining to prehistoric artifacts, sites and monuments worldwide.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Prehistoric Arts Slide Collection, Arts Library, Yale University.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of 35 mm color and black and white slides pertaining to prehistoric artifacts, sites and monuments worldwide.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged geographically by site or monument. Preceded by a general section including mobile artifacts.

did.unittitle: Le Fourneau Du Diable, France [Slide box 4]

p.emph: Also known as Los Hornos de la Peña
Also know as Peche-Merle de Cabretets
